response.justification: Mohammed has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership experience across diverse stacks and domains, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML modeling, and client-facing advisory roles critical for this role; his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the C1 requirement, and his resume lacks explicit evidence of team management or project oversight at an executive level.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across modern and niche technologies (DLang, Node.js, TypeScript, Linux)
Strong track record of mentoring and creating educational content (workshops, courses)
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or requirements management experience
Lacks documented experience leading teams or managing client projects at an executive level
